metadata.description: Cowork marketplace test: persistence, binaries, and MCPB extensions

plugins.name: sa-cowork-persist-probe
plugins.description: Minimal Cowork probe plugin that writes and reads a file from CLAUDE_PLUGIN_DATA

plugins.name: sa-cowork-bin-probe
plugins.description: Verifies plugin-root and marketplace-root binaries via cross-plugin paths

plugins.name: sa-cowork-persist-mcp
plugins.description: Manifest-based control plugin for persistence and user_config propagation

plugins.name: sa-cowork-config-mcp
plugins.description: Manifest-based control plugin for config and secret env injection

plugins.name: sa-cowork-path-mcp
plugins.description: Manifest plugin for the PATH-only CLI availability baseline

plugins.name: sa-cowork-bootstrap-mcp
plugins.description: Manifest plugin that bootstraps a bundled probe into CLAUDE_PLUGIN_DATA

plugins.name: sa-cowork-download-mcp
plugins.description: Manifest plugin that downloads and caches a generic probe on first use

plugins.name: sa-cowork-bootstrap-probe
plugins.description: Claude-style mirror for the bootstrap strategy

plugins.name: sa-cowork-download-probe
plugins.description: Claude-style mirror for the download strategy
